name: @haphazarddev/pi-interactive-code-review
description_en: A pi extension for interactive code review against your default branch, including uncommitted changes, with line or hunk comments, batching, and inline agent responses.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，用于与默认分支进行交互式代码审查，包括未提交的更改，支持行或块注释、批处理和内联代理响应。
